reviews.review_msg: When a prof makes you read original works, and the T.A.'s can't help because they say it's a Master's level textbook, we have a problem. Readings were completely useless - got more out of a 30 minute tutorial with Kevin Bonneycastle than any lectures.
Not friendly or helpful inclass or 1 on 1. Confusing lectures & vague guidelines. For sure regret taking this class w Perkins.
